run.title: Phase 1 Foundation Post-Evaluation and Phase 2 Opportunity Forecast

proof.title: Post-eval learning loops for AI product workflows
Media Studio logo brand AI workflow research
AI website builder edit enhancement workflow research
Reusable component studio registry workflow research

learnings: Phase 1 proved the backend foundation, but the next value unlock is visible Media/Site workflows anchored by the FAMtastic logo/brand system.
Post-evaluation must be a required platform contract for Shay, Site Studio, Media Studio, Component Studio, Mission Control, Data Center, and future services.
Research-first SDD should mean rough ask → research → sharper spec/prompt → plan/tasks → build → proof → post-eval → reusable learning.
Phase 2 should treat skill/process/component/media-recipe opportunities as first-class outputs, not afterthoughts.
gaps: Post-eval is now a shared local module/proof, but not yet automatically invoked by every studio/job endpoint.
The Phase 2 Media Studio and Site Studio screens/workflows are planned but not yet implemented.
No automatic promotion policy yet decides whether a post-eval opportunity becomes a skill, process rule, component, media recipe, Data Center claim, or Fritz review card.
Mission Control can read post-eval records after this slice, but the visual surface is still later in Phase 2.

opportunities.title: Research-first SDD closeout workflow
opportunities.suggested_action: Create or patch an umbrella skill after Phase 2A proves the logo workflow.

opportunities.title: Media Studio brand/logo workflow
opportunities.suggested_action: Capture prompt refinement, variant comparison, approval, export, and DESIGN.md extraction steps.

opportunities.title: Site Studio build/edit/enhance workflow
opportunities.suggested_action: Capture coconut-style site request flow with research packet, edit loop, media/component routing, and proof gates.

opportunities.title: Component decomposition before generation
opportunities.suggested_action: Turn slideshow/hero/gallery needs into component specs, full-match search, partial-piece search, and save-back rules.

opportunities.title: Research-backed asset prompt enhancer
opportunities.suggested_action: Use research/taste references to turn vague asset asks into detailed prompt variants with provenance.

opportunities.title: Cross-studio request/response broker
opportunities.suggested_action: Formalize Site→Research/Media/Component and Component→Media calls after Phase 2A/2B screens are designed.

opportunities.title: Visual workflow prototype surface
opportunities.suggested_action: Use existing browser UI before Mission Control-first; surface Media/Site workflow proof where Fritz works.

opportunities.title: Second Brain promotion rules
opportunities.suggested_action: Define which post-eval learnings become Data Center claims, Obsidian notes, memories, skills, or backlog tasks.

next_actions: Let Fritz choose which Phase 2A logo WIPs/references to load first.
Create the Phase 2A research-first SDD packet for FAMtastic logo/brand workflow.
After Phase 2A proves the workflow, create/publish the durable skill(s) rather than guessing too early.
summary: Post-evaluation for Phase 1 Foundation Post-Evaluation and Phase 2 Opportunity Forecast: 4 learnings, 4 gaps, 15 opportunities.
